overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a nighttime walk through the historic streets of Saint Denis during a heavy rainstorm. The camera moves from a narrow cobblestone alley past the Hotel Rafleur into an open plaza with a gazebo and horse-drawn carriage, then continues past a large flowering tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between historic brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked alley between tall historic buildings

entered.detail: tall red brick building with arched windows and decorative cornices
stone and brick buildings with ground floor shopfronts
vertical illuminated sign spelling RAFLEUR in white bulbs
cast iron street lamps emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, rain-slicked cobblestone alley flanked by historic brick buildings. The warm glow of vintage gas lamps reflects off the wet ground, and the vertical Hotel Rafleur sign is visible ahead on the right. The atmosphere is enclosed and intimate, with the tall structures blocking most of the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with bandstand gazebo

events.description: exiting narrow alley into open plaza with gazebo visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the space opens into a larger plaza area

entered.detail: octagonal bandstand with ornate iron railings and a domed roof
wide cobblestone square opening between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the confined alley into a spacious open plaza. The iron-fenced gazebo becomes visible in the center distance, and the Hotel Rafleur sign recedes behind. The sky opens up overhead, revealing the rainy night, while the cobblestone ground continues into the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with gazebo and flowering tree

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza while a carriage passes nearby

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: mature tree with dense pink blossoms illuminated by street lamps
large dark stone mansion with pointed roofs and multiple chimneys

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, a horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left. The gazebo shifts to the right side as the camera advances toward a large flowering tree with pink blossoms. A grand Victorian mansion looms on the right, partially obscured by rain and fog.

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the cobblestone street past the flowering tree

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence running along the sidewalk
tall cast iron lamps lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the large flowering tree, which now dominates the left side of the frame. The plaza and gazebo fall behind as the scene transitions to a residential street lined with iron fences and vintage street lamps. The rain continues to fall heavily on the cobblestones as the journey proceeds down the atmospheric historic street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, rain-slicked alleyway into a spacious urban plaza and finally onto a quiet residential street. It begins within a narrow corridor of historic brick buildings where the warm glow of gas lamps reflects off wet cobblestones and the Hotel Rafleur sign looms ahead. As the camera emerges from this enclosure, the scene opens into a wide plaza under a rainy night sky, leaving the hotel behind to reveal an iron-fenced gazebo in the distance. The movement continues across the square, passing a horse-drawn carriage and a grand Victorian mansion before drawing closer to a large flowering tree with pink blossoms. Finally, the camera glides past the blossoms as the plaza recedes, transitioning onto a historic residential street lined with iron fences and vintage lamps under the heavy rainfall.
